w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex wp14

w:r.w:t: make a documentation regarding what all things needs to be done for the AI part of this project
Project: O3 – AI-First B2B Procurement Marketplace
The purpose of the AI module is to make procurement easier for Buyers and Suppliers by providing:
For the POC, focus should be on demonstrating AI capabilities rather than building enterprise-scale production systems.
Show Titanium Dioxide suppliers in Gujarat below ₹200/kg
No ML model required for POC.
Need 1000 kg Titanium Dioxide for Ahmedabad delivery next week.
How do I upload GST documents?
Allow buyers to ask questions about chemical documents.
What is the current trend for Titanium Dioxide?
Show price changes in last 30 days.
Notify buyers when prices cross thresholds.
If your team has limited time, build only these 5 AI modules:
These are the features that most clearly demonstrate that
O3 is an AI-first procurement platform
and will likely impress stakeholders during the demo.
